_comment: PRs that merged into a consumed branch and never reached the default branch, but whose change has since been re-landed by a later default-branch PR. Listed here so scripts/audit-missed-main.mjs does not flag them forever (the original merge commit can never become an ancestor of main). Key = missed PR number, value = how it was re-landed. See issue #312.
277: re-landed on main by #313 (feat: leaderboard real names)
308: re-landed on main by #311 (feat: visible tree sway)
